requirements.text: project.md has real project identity — no <project-name>, no TODO markers, all 8 placeholder fields filled
requirements.acceptance: grep '<project-name>' .omp/memory/project/project.md returns nothing. grep '<!-- TODO' .omp/memory/project/project.md returns nothing.

requirements.text: conventions.md has filled language table — no <TypeScript | Go | Rust | Python> placeholders, Backend/Frontend say N/A
requirements.acceptance: Languages by Purpose table has no placeholder options. Backend and Frontend rows say 'N/A'.

requirements.text: tech-stack.md craft table is structurally valid — 8 contiguous rows, one header, attribution after table
requirements.acceptance: grep -c 'design/craft/' .omp/memory/project/tech-stack.md returns 8. No orphan rows. Attribution paragraph follows the table.

requirements.text: tech-stack.md verification commands are real, not placeholders
requirements.acceptance: No <tsc | mypy | cargo check> pattern. Typecheck/Lint/Test/Build/Security say N/A. Graph state commands preserved.

requirements.text: decisions.md has 5 decisions in Decision Log with sequential numbering, no Example section
gotchas.md separates template from project gotchas with blockquote note
requirements.acceptance: Active Warnings has 1 project-specific gotcha. Template Bootstrap Gotchas has 12 entries with blockquote note.

requirements.text: All memory files remain valid markdown — consistent table columns, no orphan rows
requirements.acceptance: Read each file — tables have consistent column counts, headers present.

requirements.text: No content loss from existing decisions — all 5 decisions preserved verbatim
requirements.acceptance: Each decision's rationale and confidence matches the original.

requirements.text: No content loss from existing gotchas — all 13 gotchas preserved
requirements.acceptance: All 13 gotcha entries remain, only categorization changed.

tech-stack.md craft table has 8 contiguous rows with one header, attribution after table
tech-stack.md verification commands are N/A for code checks
